personas.name: Operator
personas.role: Deploying and Operating the Aion Server

stories.text: As an operator, I want the server to recover all in-flight workflows after a restart so that a crash or deploy does not lose running workflow state and I do not need manual intervention to resume work.

As a workflow author, I want timer-based sleeps to be durable and survive server restarts so that I can write workflows with long waits (hours, days, months) without worrying about the sleep being lost.
As a workflow author, I want continue_as_new available in the SDK so that long-running subscription workflows can periodically reset their event history and avoid unbounded growth.
As a dashboard user, I want real-time workflow event streaming over WebSocket so that the dashboard live feed shows events as they happen without polling.
